## RPC contract

| RPC | gRPC | REST |
|-----|------|------|
| InternalAddressPoolService/BindAsAddressOverride | (BindAsAddressOverrideRequest) → BindResponse | POST /vpc/v1/addresses/{address_id}/addressPoolOverride |
| InternalAddressPoolService/BindAsNetworkDefault | (BindAsNetworkDefaultRequest) → BindResponse | POST /vpc/v1/networks/{network_id}/addressPoolBinding |
| InternalAddressPoolService/Check | (CheckRequest) → CheckResponse | GET /vpc/v1/addressPools:check |
| InternalAddressPoolService/Create | (CreateAddressPoolRequest) → AddressPool | POST /vpc/v1/addressPools |
| InternalAddressPoolService/Delete | (DeleteAddressPoolRequest) → DeleteAddressPoolResponse | DELETE /vpc/v1/addressPools/{pool_id} |
| InternalAddressPoolService/ExplainResolution | (ExplainResolutionRequest) → ExplainResolutionResponse | GET /vpc/v1/addressPools:explainResolution |
| InternalAddressPoolService/Get | (GetAddressPoolRequest) → AddressPool | GET /vpc/v1/addressPools/{pool_id} |
| InternalAddressPoolService/GetUtilization | (GetAddressPoolUtilizationRequest) → AddressPoolUtilization | GET /vpc/v1/addressPools/{pool_id}/utilization |
| InternalAddressPoolService/List | (ListAddressPoolsRequest) → ListAddressPoolsResponse | GET /vpc/v1/addressPools |
| InternalAddressPoolService/ListAddresses | (ListAddressPoolAddressesRequest) → ListAddressPoolAddressesResponse | GET /vpc/v1/addressPools/{pool_id}/addresses |
| InternalAddressPoolService/UnbindAddressOverride | (UnbindAddressOverrideRequest) → BindResponse | DELETE /vpc/v1/addresses/{address_id}/addressPoolOverride |
| InternalAddressPoolService/UnbindNetworkDefault | (UnbindNetworkDefaultRequest) → BindResponse | DELETE /vpc/v1/networks/{network_id}/addressPoolBinding |
| InternalAddressPoolService/Update | (UpdateAddressPoolRequest) → AddressPool | PATCH /vpc/v1/addressPools/{pool_id} |
